bio.zh: 1999年生于河南临颍。2022年赴日就读东京TVA。现居郑州，自由摄影师。Nikon Z8 主力机，涵盖人像、航拍、活动、街拍。师从有元慎也。
bio.en: Born 1999 in Linying, Henan. Studied at Tokyo TVA. Based in Zhengzhou, freelance photographer. Nikon Z8 primary camera. Student of Arimoto Shinya.

statement.zh: 相机不是工具，是另一双眼睛。街上的人、低头的瞬间、被忽略的角落——都在取景框里重新活过来。
statement.en: The camera is not a tool. It is another pair of eyes. Strangers, a downward glance, the overlooked corner — all come alive again inside the frame.

experience.en: Returned to China, freelance in Zhengzhou

equipment.name: Nikon Z8
equipment.desc: 4500万像素全画幅微单 · 主力机
